segments.caption: I give it the part, the material, and the room — it figures out what kind of part this is on its own.
It tells me where this print will fail before the nozzle moves, and points at the prior job it's reasoning from.
A separate reviewer grades the plan and can hold the print — it never marks its own homework.
Every job makes the next one better. That's the whole point.
The knowledge compounds instead of disappearing.
